name: Deathwing
description: A Massive Unstoppable Dragon that can withstand punishment while dishing it out, but is unaffected by allied Abilities.
title: The Destroyer
info: One of the five Dragon Aspects and the leader of the Black Dragonflight, Neltharion the Earth-Warder was once a protector of Azeroth. During the War of the Ancients, he was driven mad by the Old Gods and turned against his former allies. Now known as Deathwing the Destroyer, he has found his way to the Nexus where his limitless rage drives his ultimate goal of widespread destruction and the eventual end of all living things.

Deathwing.name: Molten Flame
Deathwing.description: After 1.5 seconds, Deathwing breathes a stream of flame, dealing 19 (+4% per level) damage every 0.125 seconds. Drains 30 Energy per second.

Deathwing.name: Incinerate
Deathwing.description: After 0.75 seconds, Deathwing flaps his wings, dealing 100 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.  World Breaker: Lava Burst Create a lava pool that damages and Slows

Deathwing.name: Onslaught
Deathwing.description: After 0.5 seconds, Deathwing lunges in a direction dealing 60 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and Slowing them by 35% for 2 seconds. Deathwing bites enemies at the end of the lunge, dealing an additional 120 (+4% per level) damage.  World Breaker: Earth Shatter Damage and Stun enemies in two lines

Deathwing.name: Cataclysm
Deathwing.description: After 2 seconds, Deathwing flies in the targeted direction, dealing 90 (+4% per level) damage on impact and leaving scorched ground that deals 36 (+4% per level) damage a second. Lasts 6 seconds.  Quest: Hit Heroes with Molten Flame to grant 1 stack. Quest: Score Takedowns to grant 50 stacks.  Mythic Reward: After reaching 2000 stacks, Deathwing brings on the Hour of Twilight. Cataclysm's periodic damage to Structures is increased by 2500%.

Deathwing.name: Aspect of Death
Deathwing.description: Deathwing is fitted with 4 Armor Plates which grant 10 Armor each. Every 25% Health lost causes Deathwing to lose a plate. Plates are only restored when Dragonflight is used, based on the amount of Health Deathwing has when landing.  Deathwing is also a mighty Dragon Aspect who is permanently Unstoppable and deals 100% additional Spell Damage to Heroes, but views his allies with contempt and ignores any of their friendly effects.

Deathwing.name: Dragonflight
Deathwing.description: After 3 seconds, fly into the sky, becoming Immune to all effects and gaining 2.5% Health per second. Once cast, this ability cannot be interrupted. Cannot be cast for 6 seconds after taking damage, Basic Attacking or casting an Ability.

DeathwingFormSwitch.name: Destroyer
DeathwingFormSwitch.description: After 1.75 seconds, Deathwing slams down to the ground, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area and landing in Destroyer form. Deathwing can begin to cast Abilities 3 seconds after landing.

DeathwingFormSwitch.name: World Breaker
DeathwingFormSwitch.description: After 1.75 seconds, Deathwing slams down to the ground, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area and landing in World Breaker form. Deathwing can begin to cast Abilities 3 seconds after landing.

DeathwingFormSwitch.name: Earth Shatter
DeathwingFormSwitch.description: Create a fissure of earth that deals 90 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit and Stuns them for 0.75 seconds.  Destroyer: Onslaught Lunge in a direction

DeathwingFormSwitch.name: Lava Burst
DeathwingFormSwitch.description: After a 1 second delay, deal 35 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in an area and create a pool of magma that deals 28 (+4% per level) damage per second and Slows enemies by 45%. Lasts 6 seconds.  Destroyer: Incinerate Damage enemies near Deathwing

1.name: Dragon Soul
1.description: Destroyer: Incinerate heals Deathwing for 100% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.  World Breaker: Lava Burst's explosion damage heals Deathwing for 200% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.

1.name: Molten Blood
1.description: While Deathwing has 3 or more Armor Plates, he heals for 0.6% of his maximum Health per second.

1.name: Draconic Might
1.description: Deathwing's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal him for 25% of the damage dealt. Upon losing an Armor Plate, Deathwing becomes Protected for 0.75 seconds.

4.name: Infernus
4.description: Increase the damage of Molten Flame against enemy Heroes by 25%. Increase this damage bonus to 75% when Molten Flame is cast at 75 Energy or higher.

4.name: Heat Wave
4.description: Destroyer: After hitting an enemy Hero with Incinerate, Deathwing deals 18 (+4% per level) damage per second to all nearby enemies for the next 9 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.  World Breaker: Increase the explosion damage of Lava Burst by 150%.

4.name: Dragon's Ire
4.description: While Deathwing has 3 or fewer Armor Plates, his damage is increased by 25%.

7.name: Firestorm
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Deathwing's landing Abilities by 3 seconds. When Deathwing lands, he drops 7 meteors near the landing area, dealing 77 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit.  Meteors prioritize landing on Heroes, otherwise they fall randomly in the area.

7.name: Death Drop
7.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and Deathwing's Basic Ability cooldowns by 2 seconds.

7.name: Skyfall
7.description: After using Dragonflight, Deathwing can drop meteors anywhere within vision dealing 58 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area. Has 3 charges.  If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for 3% of his maximum Health.

10.name: Burn Beneath My Shadow
10.description: When an enemy Fort or Keep is destroyed the cooldown of Cataclysm is reset. Cataclysm's periodic damage is increased by 80%.

10.name: Bellowing Roar
10.description: After 1 second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing 25 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for 1.5 seconds.

13.name: Wicked Inferno
13.description: Molten Flame's Energy cost per second is reduced by 10. After using Molten Flame, Deathwing gains 15 Energy over 3 seconds.

13.name: Ruination
13.description: Destroyer: The bite from Onslaught now Slows by 60% for 1.5 seconds.  World Breaker: Reduce Earth Shatter's cooldown by 6 seconds and its Energy cost by 10.

13.name: Fire and Fury
13.description: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Slowed, or Stunned enemy Heroes deal 40% additional damage and reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's Basic Abilities by 0.5 seconds.

16.name: Conflagration
16.description: Dealing 320 (+4% per level) damage with Molten Flame to enemy Heroes within 4 seconds causes them to burn for an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. While burning, they explode every 1 second, dealing 80 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.

16.name: Gaze Onto Destruction
16.description: Hitting Heroes with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing causes their damage to be reduced by 75% and Slows them by 40% for 3.5 Seconds.

16.name: Elementium Plating
16.description: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 30% of Deathwing's missing Health for 8 seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates 2% of his maximum Health per second.  When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.  The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.

20.name: Stood in the Fire
20.description: Enemy Heroes are Slowed by 40% while standing in scorched ground, and its duration is increased by 50%.

20.name: Arrival of a God
20.description: Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage is increased by 400%.  Deathwing also gains the benefits of all of his level 7 talents.

20.name: Destroyer's Rampage
20.description: For the next 6 seconds after landing in Destroyer form, Deathwing's damage is increased by 40% and his Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster.  Damaging Heroes refreshes this effect.

tooltipMarkup.DeathwingArrivalOfAGod: <c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer</c> or <c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker's</c> landing damage is increased by <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DeathwingDragonflightLandDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ArrivalOfAGod].Modifier"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Deathwing also gains the benefits of all of his level <c val="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> talents.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingAspectOfDeath: Deathwing is fitted with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,DeathwingAdamantineArmorPlatesAccumulator,MaxAccumulation/Accumulator,DeathwingAdamantineArmorPlatesAccumulator,Scale"/></c> Armor Plates which grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,DeathwingAdamantineArmorPlatesAccumulator,Scale"/></c> Armor each. Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,DeathwingHealthLE25,Value*100"/>%</c> Health lost causes Deathwing to lose a plate. Plates are only restored when Dragonflight is used, based on the amount of Health Deathwing has when landing.<n/><n/>Deathwing is also a mighty Dragon Aspect who is permanently Unstoppable and deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingMoltenFlameDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[HeroDamage].Modifier*100" precision="2"/>%</c> additional Spell Damage to Heroes, but views his allies with contempt and ignores any of their friendly effects.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingBellowingRoarTalent: After <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeathwingBellowingRoar,CastIntroTime"/></c> second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingBellowingRoarDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingBellowingRoarFear,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingBurnBeneathMyShadow: When an enemy Fort or Keep is destroyed the cooldown of Cataclysm is reset. Cataclysm's periodic damage is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingCataclysmDoTDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Burn].Modifier*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingCataclysm: After seconds, Deathwing flies in the targeted direction, dealing damage on impact and leaving scorched ground that deals damage a second. While burning, they explode every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingConflagrationDoT,Period"/></c> second, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingConflagrationExplosionDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to all nearby enemies.

Deathwing can begin to cast Abilities <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingDragonflightLandAbilityCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds after landing.

Upon losing an Armor Plate, Deathwing becomes Protected for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingDraconicMight,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingDragonSoul: <c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer:</c> <c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Incinerate</c> heals Deathwing for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,DeathwingDragonSoul,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value*100"/>%</c> of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker: Lava Burst's</c> explosion damage heals Deathwing for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,DeathwingDragonSoul,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*100"/>%</c> of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.

Cannot be cast for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingDragonflightSetCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" player="0"/></c> seconds after taking damage, Basic Attacking or casting an Ability.

tooltipMarkup.DeathwingElementiumPlatingTalent: Activate to gain a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingElementiumPlatingMissingHealthRatioDummy,XP*100"/>%</c> of Deathwing's missing Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingElementiumPlatingShield,Duration"/></c> seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingElementiumPlatingCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*100"/>%</c> of his maximum Health per second. <n/><n/>When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.<n/><n/>The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingFireAndFury: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Slowed, or Stunned enemy Heroes deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[DeathwingFireAndFury].Modifier*100"/>%</c> additional damage and reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's Basic Abilities by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,DeathwingFireAndFuryCooldownReductionModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingFirestorm: Reduce the cooldown of Deathwing's landing Abilities by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeathwingWorldbreakerForm,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse-Effect,DeathwingDragonflightFirestormCooldownReduction,EffectArray[0].Value"Player="0"/></c> seconds. When Deathwing lands, he drops <c val="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> meteors near the landing area, dealing <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingFirestormExplosionDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies hit. <n/><n/>Meteors prioritize landing on Heroes, otherwise they fall randomly in the area.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingGazeOntoDestruction: Hitting Heroes with <c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer</c> or <c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker's</c> landing causes their damage to be reduced by <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,DeathwingGazeOntoDestructionDamageReduction,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100" precision="2"/>%</c> and Slows them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,DeathwingGazeOntoDestructionSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="2"/>%</c> for <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingGazeOntoDestructionSlow,Duration"precision="2"/></c> Seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingHeatWave: <c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer:</c> After hitting an enemy Hero with <c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Incinerate</c>, Deathwing deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingHeatWaveDamage,Amount/Behavior,DeathwingHeatWaveBuff,Period"/></c> damage per second to all nearby enemies for the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingHeatWaveBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds. Stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingHeatWaveToken,Max+1"/></c> times.<n/><n/><c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker:</c> Increase the explosion damage of <c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">Lava Burst</c> by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingLavaBurstExplosionDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[DeathwingHeatWave].Modifier*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingIncinerate: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeathwingIncinerate,CastIntroTime" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds, Deathwing flaps his wings, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingIncinerateDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies.<n/><n/><c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker: Lava Burst</c><n/>Create a lava pool that damages and Slows
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingInfernus: Increase the damage of Molten Flame against enemy Heroes by <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DeathwingMoltenFlameDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[InfernusBaseDamageBuff].Modifier"/>%</c>. Increase this damage bonus to <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Effect,DeathwingMoltenFlameDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[DeathwingInfernus].Modifier+Effect,DeathwingMoltenFlameDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[InfernusBaseDamageBuff].Modifier)"/>%</c> when Molten Flame is cast at <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Validator,DeathwingCasterHasGTE75EnergyInfernus,Value"Precision="2"/></c> Energy or higher.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingLavaBurst: After a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingLavaBurstInitialPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> second delay, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingLavaBurstExplosionDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to all enemies in an area and create a pool of magma that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingLavaBurstBurnDamage,Amount / Effect,DeathwingLavaBurstCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/></c> damage per second and Slows enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,DeathwingLavaBurstSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" preicison="2"/>%</c>. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingLavaBurstCreatePersistent,PeriodCount * 0.25"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer: Incinerate</c><n/>Damage enemies near Deathwing
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingMoltenBlood: While Deathwing has <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> or more Armor Plates, he heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingMoltenBloodSelfHeal,RechargeVitalFraction*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of his maximum Health per second.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingMoltenFlame: After <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeathwingMoltenFlame,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, Deathwing breathes a stream of flame, dealing <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingMoltenFlameDamage,Amount"/></c> damage every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingMoltenFlameChannelPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="3"/></c> seconds. Drains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Behavior,DeathwingMoltenFlameEnergyCost,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Energy]" player="0"/></c> Energy per second.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingOnslaught: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeathwingOnslaught,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, Deathwing lunges in a direction dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingOnslaughtDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies and Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,DeathwingOnslaughtSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingOnslaughtSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Deathwing bites enemies at the end of the lunge, dealing an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingOnslaughtBiteDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.<n/><n/><c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker: Earth Shatter</c><n/>Damage and Stun enemies in two lines
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingRuination: <c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer:</c> The bite from <c val="#DeathwingDestroyer">Onslaught</c> now Slows by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,DeathwingRuinationSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingRuinationSlow,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker:</c> Reduce <c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">Earth Shatter's</c> cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,DeathwingRuination,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds and its Energy cost by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,DeathwingRuination,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingSkyfall: After using Dragonflight, Deathwing can drop meteors anywhere within vision dealing <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingSkyfallExplosionDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in the area. Has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeathwingSkyfall,Cost.Charge.CountMax" player="0"/></c> charges.<n/><n/>If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingSkyfallCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*100"precision="1"/>%</c> of his maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingStoodInTheFire: Enemy Heroes are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,DeathwingCataclysmStoodInTheFireSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> while standing in scorched ground, and its duration is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,DeathwingStoodInTheFire,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Effect,DeathwingCataclysmGroundPersistent,PeriodCount"Player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingWickedInferno: Molten Flame's Energy cost per second is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,DeathwingWickedInferno,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c>. After using Molten Flame, Deathwing gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingMoltenFlameWickedInfernoEnergyGain,Duration/Behavior,DeathwingMoltenFlameWickedInfernoEnergyGain,Period*Behavior,DeathwingMoltenFlameWickedInfernoEnergyGain,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Energy]"/></c> Energy over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeathwingMoltenFlameWickedInfernoEnergyGain,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeathwingWorldbreaker: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeathwingWorldbreakerForm,CastIntroTime" precision="3" player="0"/></c> seconds, Deathwing slams down to the ground, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingDragonflightLandDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in the area and landing in <c val="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker</c> form. Deathwing can begin to cast Abilities <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeathwingDragonflightLandAbilityCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds after landing.
